testing_authorizations.playwright: N/A for every requirement — the change ships CLI installers + command-wrapper markdown in a plugin-source repo; there is no frontend, no route, no browser surface. Authorization recorded per Phase 1 rule (no frontend requirement exists).
testing_authorizations.dev_api_integration: N/A — no API endpoint exists or is touched; the integration layer under test is process-level (argparse CLIs + file-system state), covered by hermetic pytest integration tests through the real parser/handler path with injected seams (the house convention for scripts/setup, cf. tests/test_install_gateway.py).

scenarios: absent Anthropic key directs an in-session ask
acceptance_criteria: commands/architect-team-setup.md carries the v3.38.0 ask section: AskUserQuestion on absent-key states with capture-and-apply (--anthropic-key/--openai-key) and explicit-decline (decline subcommand) dispositions
--yes/CT6_SETUP_ASSUME_YES on the original run carries over as --activate consent on capture; no prior signal keeps activation consent-gated
the bare run-this-script remediation is never the only path; declined slots are consulted via status and not re-asked
pinned by tests/test_commands.py wrapper-text pins; instruction-compliance lint zero findings

scenarios: interactive TTY with absent key prompts hidden
acceptance_criteria: _prompt_for_key fires only on interactive + TTY + unresolved + not-declined; hidden getpass entry; visible-input fallback only when hidden entry unachievable, with warning
captured key lands only in gateway.env (0600 best-effort) and masks to last-4 in every report line
blank entry proceeds exactly as today's absent-key path and records the decline
--yes-equivalent, non-TTY, --check-only, --json runs never invoke the seam (byte-equivalent behavior aside from decline bookkeeping)
setup.py passes interactivity through only when NOT assume_yes/check_only and stdin is a TTY; seam exceptions degrade to the warn row
key-declines.json in the gateway state dir records slot + declined_at + via (wrapper|prompt-skip)
decline <slot> records; decline <slot> --clear clears; --re-ask-keys clears all slots
a slot's decline auto-resets when that slot's key resolves on any path
status appends declined=<slots>; uninstall --purge removes the record

scenarios: librarian installer prompts on interactive TTY
acceptance_criteria: install_librarian.py: same seam + decline record + --re-ask-keys + decline subcommand for the anthropic slot; captured key routes through the existing enable path; blank keeps provisioned-but-NOT-enabled honestly
commands/librarian-install.md carries the equivalent ask section
pinned by tests/test_install_librarian.py + tests/test_commands.py

design.md sweep table dispositions every scripts/setup/*.py: install_gateway + install_librarian qualify; setup.py's own punts, install_mempalace.py, set_default_model.py, and the non-installer helpers examined-and-excluded with reasons
CHANGELOG entry summarizes the sweep

scenarios: captured key never appears raw outside the env file
acceptance_criteria: setup_entry warn-degrade posture holds under seam exceptions (never gates)
raw keys only in env files; last-4 masking everywhere; prompt entry hidden (never echoed by the scripts)
activation stays consent-gated with the --yes carry-over; uninstall symmetry extends to the decline record under --purge
every pre-existing test pin in test_install_gateway.py / test_install_librarian.py / test_setup_install_fallbacks.py stays green unmodified except where counts/pins legitimately extend
plugin.json + marketplace.json -> 3.38.0; dispatch-banner pin -> 3.38.0
CHANGELOG entry; documentation-currency inventory current (README, CLAUDE.md, map note ledgers)
full pytest suite green under Windows cp1252 AND PYTHONUTF8=1
